title: StoryScript
description: StoryScript is a Minecraft mod that allows you to create storylines right in the game.
body:
# StoryScript
The storylines are right in Minecraft.

With StoryScript, you can create your own story maps in which, in the future, NPCs and camera controls.

### How to use it?

- Create a `<name>.sscript` file along the path `<Minecraft folder>/SScripts/`.
- You can write various commands in this file (the full list of commands is given in the [wiki](https://storyscript.gitbook.io/storyscript/)).
- After you have written the commands you need, you need to run the script using `/ss <file path>`.

![Message example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e0b0fdd5f182352e1c539194617762c9fe22424.png)

> Warning! The mod is under development, so the functionality of the mod will be supplemented!
